title: ELEX
notes: ~80% of native Windows performance

title: ELEX
notes:
No Meddling: Game Crashes instantly with a Wine error Box dropping a .dmp file.

With Meddling: Using PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 %command% as a start up option you get to see the intro videos. After that the game freezes to black screen and opens 6 wine error boxes in the background which have to be forcibly closed.

title: ELEX
notes: Does stutter a bit out of the box even with high framerates. After disabling the compositor the game runs smooth as butter.

title: ELEX
notes: Starts without errors. Performance is playable but not great. Max. 30FPS

title: ELEX
notes: Had some weird error when i first started it, after a system restart it is running flawlessly (only minor FPS drops during cut scenes).

title: Elex
notes: Main menu worked on start, seemed to work pretty well / starting a game crashed when joining the world and I couldn't get to main menu afterward / None

notes: Native performance
title: ELEX

notes: Facial animations are completely borked, wont launch with a controller plugged in.
title: ELEX

notes:
First launch after intros has long frozen screen while shaders are being compiled.
DXVK.80 increased reliability of the game considerably. Hasn't crashed since.
title: ELEX

notes: I never played this on windows so I cannot testify if it runs at native performance. However I run a pretty outdated rig (see my system info) and I can play this game without problems with FXAA, everything to medium and High render distance. Game works out of the box with Proton beta. No tweaks required.
title: ELEX

notes: On highest settings I get around 80% of native Windows performance (it's 50-60 FPS in most demanded urban scenes and more at outdoor, so game is really fluid).
title: ELEX

notes: Is totally playable in terms of performance. I would guess that you could achieve 90% of native performance on High settings. There is one issue though which could be specific to my system: The game crashes randomly and I cannot figure out why. Sometimes you can play an hour other times it will crash after a few minutes. The issue with a plugged in controller still exists. You have to unplug controllers before starting the game. Face animations are not broken anymore. To sum: Installation and starting the games does not need any tweaks. Good performance. Random crashes (maybe due to my system). Would set it to Platinum if I could say fore sure the crashes are a problem on my side.
title: ELEX

notes: Must put "PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%" in Steam Launch Option to make the game run. It hangs after the Piranha Bytes logo. Unplayable.
title: ELEX

notes:
Sometimes crashes when using the jetpack. 
Game is unplayable with default settings, on lowest graphical settings in 1270x720 the maximum is still 50 fps, often stutters.
Doesn't start with PROTON_NO_D3D11=1.
title: ELEX

notes: Black screen after developer logo, with no way to alt-tab out of the game. Also same with the wined3d11 contrary to what others wrote here.
title: ELEX

notes: black screen on launch
title: ELEX

notes: Few days ago I finished ELEX (main story and a lot of side quests, maybe even all) playing just on Linux. It took to me 80+ hours, but I spent a lot of time on map exploring. It's 2nd time when I finished this game, at 1st time I played on Windows 10 and my experiences from playing on both platforms are the same. Performance is really good, just slightly lower (few percents) than on Windows 10. It's great that I don't have to run Windows 10 anymore for playing my favourites games thanks to Proton.
title: ELEX
